case_title: ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC VS GOLDEN GATE YACHT CLUB INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $751.31 FILED BY ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE YACHT CLUB INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE YACHT CLUB INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE YACHT CLUB INC. $753.31 PRINCIPAL, $62.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $815.81 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE YACHT CLUB INC.
